# v0.1.2

## English

### New Features

- First release of Skills call analytics, including `Total Calls`, `7d`, and `Last Called At`, with filtering by `agent/source/evidence`.
- Added a Skill call timeline view with async refresh and progress feedback, so analysis no longer blocks operations.
- Added built-in Agent presets for 14 platforms with visual cards, so users can enable and manage agents without manual naming.
- Added one-click `Redetect` and `Restore Defaults` for Agent settings, with support for multiple Skill search directories per agent.
- Added safer conflict handling in Skills linking with an `Update then link` path.

### Fixes

- Fixed Skills operations sorting issues where call-based sorting did not consistently update list order.
- Fixed the usage-analysis status banner so users can dismiss it after sync finishes.
- Reduced parsing noise from unsupported agent formats and improved token normalization to lower false `skill-not-mapped` outcomes.
- Fixed enabled-agent drag sorting instability so ordering stays consistent between Settings and Skills views.

### Improvements

- Improved call-analysis reliability with evidence-based mapping and clearer signal quality.
- Improved overall Workbench stability through deeper module decomposition and stricter codebase governance checks.
- Refreshed bilingual product documentation and screenshots to make onboarding and feature discovery more straightforward.

## 中文

### 新功能

- 首次上线 Skills 调用次数分析，提供 `Total Calls`、`7d`、`Last Called At`，并支持按 `agent/source/evidence` 过滤。
- 新增 Skill 调用时间轴视图，支持异步刷新与进度反馈，分析过程不阻塞其它操作。
- 新增 14 个平台的 Agent 内置预设卡片，用户无需手工命名即可启用和管理 Agent。
- 新增 Agent 配置的一键`重新检测`与`恢复默认`，并支持每个 Agent 配置多个 Skill 搜索目录。
- Skills 链接冲突场景新增`更新后链接`路径，处理冲突更安全、更顺滑。

### 修复

- 修复 Skills 中控在“调用次数排序”场景下列表顺序更新不稳定的问题。
- 修复调用分析状态条在完成后不可关闭的问题，支持用户主动关闭提示。
- 优化不支持 Agent 格式下的解析噪声与 token 归一化逻辑，降低 `skill-not-mapped` 误报。
- 修复已启用 Agent 拖拽排序稳定性问题，确保 Settings 与 Skills 看板顺序一致。

### 改进

- 基于证据信号优化调用映射与统计稳定性，提升调用分析结果可信度。
- 通过更细粒度模块拆分与代码治理校验，提升 Workbench 在持续迭代下的稳定性与可维护性。
- 更新中英双语产品文档与截图，降低新用户上手成本并提升功能可发现性。
